_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular-guided therapy predictions reveal drug resistance phenotypes and treatment alternatives in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: Molecular-guided therapy prediction analyses (Figure 1 A) were performed based on published expression data from five MPNST-derived cell lines and six human MPNST tissue samples
details: Successfully performed molecular-guided therapy prediction analyses identifying hypothetical drug targets and resistance indicators for MPNST samples
